title: Slate
headline: Slate
subheadline: Beautiful, interactive dashboards that make city data accessible to everyone.
body: Slate transforms raw city data into visual, interactive dashboards that staff and residents can understand at a glance. From compliance heat maps to trend charts, Slate helps your team make data-driven decisions and share insights with the public—no technical skills required.

features.title: Interactive Dashboards
features.description: Build and customize dashboards with drag-and-drop widgets for maps, charts, and tables.

features.title: Public-Facing Views
features.description: Share read-only dashboards with residents to increase transparency and public trust.

features.title: Real-Time Updates
features.description: Dashboards refresh automatically as underlying data changes in Building Blocks.

features.title: Export & Embed
features.description: Export charts as images or embed live dashboards on your city's website.
